rationale: Both papers center on power distance belief, and the citing paper explicitly states it "extends PDB research" while using individual- and country-level PDB operationalizations across six studies. The cited 2010 JMR paper is described as developing PDB measures/priming manipulations for consumer research, making it a plausible foundational theory/method source rather than a generic mention. Given this construct and method overlap (despite only one DOI-matched reference entry), this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
